title: Own the Pipe
hook_text: Don't dig for gold. Sell the shovels.
body_text: The platform earns more than the players on it
voiceover_text: Don't dig for gold. Sell the shovels. In every gold rush, most miners go broke and the people selling tools get rich. The same pattern is playing out right now with AI. Everyone is rushing to use these tools to make money. That's the digging. The quieter, more durable play is to position yourself one level up. Teach people how to use the tools. Build the templates they need. Recommend the stack that works and earn when they buy it. You stop betting on one mine and start earning from everyone who's mining. That's why creators who explain the tools often out-earn the people grinding with them. Pick your level. Be a miner if you want, but know the shovel sellers rarely go home empty-handed. ... If you want to stop renting your life and start building real assets, follow The Leverage Stack. One AI tool, every weekday.
caption: Don't dig for gold, sell the shovels. In every gold rush the miners go broke and the toolmakers get rich, and AI is no different. Most people are rushing to use the tools; the durable play is one level up: teach the tools, build the templates, recommend the stack. You stop betting on one mine and earn from everyone mining. #aitools #passiveincome #financialfreedom #theleveragestack #wealthbuilding #sidehustle #aiautomation #buildingwealth
